title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.34 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding above 0.7096, with RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; watch for further gains.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% — watch for potential squeeze risk, especially if ECB holds rates at 2% on April 30.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, but watch for potential shifts in market sentiment.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Breaks
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break — JPY no longer acting as safe haven, watch for implications on USD/JPY positioning.
